title: General Counsel
summary: The legal leader responsible for contracts, rights, governance legality, regulatory posture, disclosure discipline, and institutional protection.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the General Counsel role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The legal leader responsible for contracts, rights, governance legality, regulatory posture, disclosure discipline, and institutional protection.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Provide the legal architecture that protects Neuroartan’s assets, public claims, contracts, rights, and governance movement.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
